name: Neapolitan Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease two 17 x 11 pans and line with wax paper.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Mix chocolate cake mix according to package directions. Pour into one pan. Bake for 15 minutes or until done. Remove from oven.
4. Mix yellow cake mix according to package directions. Prepare the second pan as above. Divide batter and color half with red food coloring. Pour into the second pan. Bake for 15 minutes or until done. Remove from oven.
5. FILLING: In a large bowl, beat butter, cream cheese, powdered sugar, milk, and salt until fluffy. Add green food coloring and mix well.
6. FROSTING: In another bowl, beat together butter, salt, cocoa, milk, and powdered sugar until smooth.
7. ASSEMBLE: Cut each cake layer into 4 even rectangles for a total of 16 rectangles. Place one rectangle on a serving tray and spread with filling. Continue layering the remaining rectangles, alternating colors and adding more filling between layers. Frost the sides lightly with chocolate frosting. The torte can be stored in the freezer.
